news.title: NET OPEN. Kenzo Deswert (32) opent La Folie in Stadsschouwburg Antwerpen: “Totaalervaring met gastronomie, muziek en sfeer” - HLN
news.summary:
# Summary

Chef Kenzo Deswert (32) has just opened **La Folie**, a new gastronomic restaurant inside Antwerp's Stadsschouwburg theater. The concept combines fine dining with live music and atmosphere for a complete dining experience. Visitors to Antwerp should care because it offers an unique food destination that merges gastronomy with entertainment in a prestigious cultural venue.

news.title: "Ambiciono mais do que aquilo que conquistei no Alma": Henrique Sá Pessoa já inaugurou novo restaurante no Páteo Bagatela - Observador

# Summary

Acclaimed Portuguese chef Henrique Sá Pessoa has opened a new restaurant at Páteo Bagatela, marking an expansion beyond his renowned Alma establishment. Visitors to the city now have access to another dining concept from one of Portugal's most celebrated chefs, offering an additional high-quality restaurant option in a prime location. This is significant for food enthusiasts seeking top-tier dining experiences from a chef with a strong track record of culinary excellence.
